# 测量类最终验收报告模板-稳定性

## 门禁命令

```powershell
& "./scripts/run-tests-measurement-stability.ps1" -NoBuild -NoRestore -Verbosity minimal
```

## 结果表

| Operator | Repeat Count | Metric | StdDev | Drift | Pass / Fail | Notes |
|---|---:|---|---:|---:|---|---|
| WidthMeasurement | 100 | Width(px) |  |  |  |  |
| ColorMeasurement | 100 | HueMean(deg) |  |  |  |  |
| HistogramAnalysis | 100 | Mode / Median |  |  |  |  |
| SharpnessEvaluation | 100 | Score |  |  |  |  |
